MenuItem.title: MenuItem
MenuItem.description: Represents an item available on the tuckshop menu.

id.description: Unique identifier for the menu item.

description.description: Detailed description of the menu item.

imageUrl.description: URL of the image representing the menu item.

category.description: Category of the menu item (e.g., snacks, drinks, lunch).

isAvailable.description: Indicates whether the menu item is currently available.

Order.title: Order
Order.description: Represents an order placed by a student or staff member.

orderDate.description: Date and time when the order was placed.

status.description: Current status of the order (e.g., pending, processing, completed, cancelled).

paymentMethod.description: Payment method used for the order (e.g., credit card, online payment).

notes.description: Any additional notes or instructions for the order.

OrderItem.title: OrderItem
OrderItem.description: Represents a single item within an order.

id.description: Unique identifier for the order item.

quantity.description: Quantity of the menu item in the order.

unitPrice.description: Price of a single unit of the menu item at the time of the order.

subtotal.description: Subtotal for the order item (quantity * unitPrice).

Inventory.title: Inventory
Inventory.description: Represents the current stock level of a menu item.

id.description: Unique identifier for the inventory entry.

stockLevel.description: Current stock level of the menu item.

lastRestockDate.description: Date and time when the item was last restocked.

restockThreshold.description: Minimum stock level before a restock is recommended.

User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user of the TuckshopKonnect application (student, parent, or admin).

id.description: Unique identifier for the user, matching their Firebase Auth UID.

avatarUrl.description: URL of the user's profile picture.

balance.description: Current wallet balance for the user (typically a student).

class.description: Class level of the user, if they are a student.

dailyLimit.description: Individual daily spending limit for a student, which overrides default limits.

parentId.description: The user ID of the parent linked to this student account.

childIds.description: A map of user IDs for the children linked to this parent account, where keys are child UIDs and values are true.

schoolId.description: The ID of the school this user belongs to.

AppSettings.title: Application Settings
AppSettings.description: Stores global configuration for the application.

jssLimit.description: Default daily spending limit for Junior Secondary School students.

sssLimit.description: Default daily spending limit for Senior Secondary School students.

orderTimerEnabled.description: Whether the automated shop open/close timer is active.

orderOpenTime.description: The time the shop opens for orders (e.g., '08:00').

orderCloseTime.description: The time the shop closes for orders (e.g., '14:00').

stopOrders.description: A master override to stop all new orders immediately.

posScannerEnabled.description: Whether the POS QR Code scanner feature is enabled for admins.

School.title: School
School.description: Represents a school using the platform.

name.description: The official name of the school.

createdAt.description: The date and time the school was registered.

definition.description: Stores menu items available at the tuckshop. Accessible to all users for viewing.

params.name: menuItemId
params.description: Unique identifier for the menu item.

definition.description: Top-level collection for all orders, intended for admin access.
Stores orders placed by individual users. Includes the `userId` for authorization independence.

params.name: userId
params.description: Unique identifier for the user who placed the order.

definition.description: Stores inventory information for each menu item.

params.name: menuItemId
params.description: Unique identifier for the associated menu item.

definition.description: Stores individual items within an order.  The parent order's `userId` provides authorization context.

params.name: userId
params.description: Unique identifier for the user who placed the order.

params.name: orderItemId
params.description: Unique identifier for the order item.

definition.description: Stores global application settings. Writable only by admins. Use a single document with a known ID like 'global' to store all settings.

params.name: settingId
params.description: The unique identifier for the setting document (e.g., 'global').

definition.description: Stores information about each school registered on the platform.

firestore.reasoning: The Firestore structure is designed to support the TuckshopKonnect application, focusing on menu display, order placement, order management, and inventory control. It leverages path-based ownership for user-specific data (orders) and a top-level collection for menu items accessible to all users. A top-level `/orders` collection is included for admin-level querying of all orders. Authorization Independence is achieved by storing the `userId` directly within the `Order` documents, eliminating the need for security rules to traverse to parent documents. QAPs are supported by segregating data based on ownership (orders under user IDs) and providing a flat, easily queryable structure for menu items and all orders.
